items.name: Cristiane L.
items.quote: Amei o seu trabalho.

items.name: Thauane
items.quote:
Boa tarde Juliana!
Muito obrigada por todo o carinho e atenção ontem, a maquiagem e o cabelo ficaram ótimos!

items.name: Leili G.
items.quote:
Oi Juliana!!
Vocês arrasaram no nosso cabelo e maquiagem!
Pessoal elogiou bastante!
E vocês duas são super queridas!
Obrigada pelo carinho!

items.name: Aline N.
items.quote: Muito obrigada pela companhia de voces la em casa no sabado de manha. Muito obrigada por ajudar, me ajudar, ajudar a minha famila a se preparar para este momento tao especial. Voce e a Karina foram maravilhosas, a gente gostou muito, obrigada por cada detalhe, horas que voces passaram com a gente.

items.name: Sara G.
items.quote:
Hi Juliana, thank you so much for being so calm, collected, helpful, receptive to comments I made for the makeup and you did so well!! I was so happy with my makeup and hair! Thank you so much, I felt so pretty 🥰
Much love!

items.name: Melliza Q.
items.quote:
It was truly the best day! Thank you so much! I will make sure to recommend you to my friends 😊
Thank you for doing a beautiful job with my hair. You made my day stress-free!

items.name: Jessica R.
items.quote:
Hi Juliana! We all loved our hair and makeup! It turned out beautifully and lasted all day!
Thank you so much for coming out! Everything was perfect 🥰

items.name: Cassandra S.
items.quote: Thank you so much, the wedding was amazing! We all loved our makeup and it held up so well even though I was so sweaty all day haha! Thank you again for everything!

items.name: Chasya R.
items.quote: Thank you so much everything was so beautiful.

items.name: Ella B.
items.quote: You were such a wonderful part of me wedding day, thank you for making my curly updo dreams a reality, and for making everyone look and feel gorgeous!

items.name: Leslye B.
items.quote:
It was fantastic!!!
Everyone loved our makeup!

items.name: Rosanna S.
items.quote: Hi Juliana! we absolutely loved the hair and make up you did for us. I had so many people compliment my look which really accentuated my dress. I felt so beautiful on my wedding day. Thank you for being part of our special day!

items.name: Madelyn B.
items.quote: Hi! Thanks so much for getting me ready! It was a great day! Everything held up wonderfully!!

items.name: Carla L.
items.quote: Thank you so much Juliana for being a part of our special day!

items.name: Monica Y.
items.quote:
Thank you so much Juliana!!
The makeup was SOLID til the end of the night I appreciate you so much.

items.name: Zameena R.
items.quote: Thank you for bringing your warmth and kindness to my special day.

items.name: Andrea V.
items.quote:
Foi perfeito !! Todo muito elogiou o meu cabelo e maquiagem.
Ficou incrível !! Mais do que imaginava.
Muitooo obrigada.

items.name: Aline O.
items.quote:
Foi tudo perfeitamente incrível!
Gratidão por tudo! Você é incrível de verdade!
Nossa que trabalho impecável!
Vai estar na minha lista sempre!

items.name: Julia L.
items.quote: Thank you for everything Juliana! The makeup, it looked gorgeous and everyone complimented it 🥰

items.name: Keone G.
items.service: Bridal Makeup & Bridesmaid Hair and Makeup
items.quote: Thank you so much! You did such a beautiful job for us

items.name: Lisa O.
items.quote: It was a pleasure to have you.

items.name: Chantal D.
items.quote: Hey Juliana! I wanted to reach out and thank you for the make up and hair last Saturday! I’ve never felt so amazing, you are so great at what you do!  I also wanted to share a picture Lisa and I took on her wedding day!,  Oh and, could i please get a picture of that lipstick shade you used on me, totally forgot, i loved it!!

items.name: Megan S.
items.quote: Thank you so much Juliana! You were such a lovely presence to have on our special day! Thank you so much for being there you did a fantastic job with the bridesmaids’ hair  I will be sure to give you a fantastic review!

items.name: Fatima G.
items.quote:
Hi Juliana.
Thank you so much for making the look a reality. Your attention and care definitely calmed my nerves and made sure that I looked my best.
Thank you for all your work!

items.name: Tatiana S.
items.service: Bridal Hair & Mother-of-Bride Hair and Makeup
items.quote:
Juuuuuu, bom dia!!!! Tudo bem?
Ju primeiramente nem sei como lhe agradecer, pelo seu trabalho, carinho e por ser tão especial e cuidar da gente com tanto amor e delicadeza….obrigada por fazer parte desse um momento de uma forma tão especial jamais esqueceremos.

items.name: Elena F.
items.quote: And thank you again for making the hair and makeup process for my wedding so stress free and organized and everything turned out so amazing!!

items.name: Janice L.
items.quote:
Muitissimo obrigada,
Fiquei super feliz com o meu cabelo.

items.name: Rachel A.
items.service: Bridal Hair and Makeup & Mother-of-Bride Hair and Makeup
items.quote:
Passando so pata te agradecer mais uma vez. Falar que nos fizemos muito, mas muito, mas muito sucesso. Minha mae tambem fez mutio sucesso. Foi comparada a atriz de Hollywood. Nossa, ela esta assim se achando linda e maravilhosa.
Eu recebi tantos elgogios de maravilhosa, da mulher mais da festa.
Muitissimo obrigada. Ficou tudo perfeito, muito obrigada mesmo.
Beijo Ju
